prismaQueryEvents.sql:
SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, udt_name, is_nullable, column_default,
           character_maximum_length
    FROM information_schema.columns
    WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position

SELECT
      tc.table_name AS from_table,
      kcu.column_name AS from_column,
      ccu.table_name AS to_table,
      ccu.column_name AS to_column,
      tc.constraint_name,
      rc.delete_rule,
      rc.update_rule
    FROM informa

SELECT
      i.schemaname,
      i.tablename,
      i.indexname,
      i.indexdef,
      pg_relation_size(c.oid) AS index_bytes
    FROM pg_indexes i
    JOIN pg_class c ON c.relname = i.indexname
    JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.r

SELECT tc.table_name, kcu.column_name, tc.constraint_name
    FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc
    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu
      ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.tab

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "Payment" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "WalletTransaction" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT id FROM "Trade" WHERE "userId" IS NOT NULL AND status = 'CLOSED' ORDER BY "closedAt" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT * FROM "Trade" WHERE status = 'OPEN' LIMIT 50
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Trade"

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "EquitySnapshot" c
      LEFT JOIN "BrokerAccount" p ON p."id" = c."brokerAccountId"
      WHERE c."brokerAccountId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "public"."User"."id" FROM "public"."User" WHERE 1=1 OFFSET $1) AS "sub"

SELECT schemaname, relname AS table_name, indexrelname AS index_name,
             idx_scan, idx_tup_read, idx_tup_fetch,
             pg_relation_size(indexrelid) AS index_bytes
      FROM pg_stat_user_indexes
      ORDER BY idx_sca

SELECT "brokerAccountId", "brokerTicket", COUNT(*)::bigint AS c
        FROM "Trade"
        WHERE "brokerTicket" IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
        LIMIT 50

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "UserSession" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT conname AS constraint_name, conrelid::regclass::text AS table_name, pg_get_constraintdef(oid) AS definition
    FROM pg_constraint
    WHERE contype = 'c' AND connamespace = 'public'::regnamespace

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "BrokerAccount" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "UserSubscription" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT c.relname AS table_name, c.relrowsecurity AS rls_enabled, c.relforcerowsecurity AS rls_forced
      FROM pg_class c
      JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
      WHERE n.nspname = 'public' AND c.relkind = 'r'

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "UserStrategySubscription" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "public"."Trade"."id" FROM "public"."Trade" WHERE 1=1 OFFSET $1) AS "sub"

SELECT rolname, rolsuper, rolcreaterole, rolcreatedb, rolcanlogin
      FROM pg_roles
      WHERE rolcanlogin = true
      ORDER BY rolname
      LIMIT 40
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT status, COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(profit),0) FROM "Trade" GROUP BY status

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "Trade" c
      LEFT JOIN "BrokerAccount" p ON p."id" = c."brokerAccountId"
      WHERE c."brokerAccountId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS bad
        FROM "Trade"
        WHERE "closedAt" IS NOT NULL AND "openedAt" IS NOT NULL AND "closedAt" < "openedAt"

SELECT c.relname AS table_name,
           pg_total_relation_size(c.oid) AS total_bytes,
           pg_relation_size(c.oid) AS table_bytes,
           pg_indexes_size(c.oid) AS index_bytes,
           c.reltuples::bigint AS est_rows
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT * FROM "EquitySnapshot" ORDER BY "capturedAt" DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT pid, state, wait_event_type, wait_event,
             now() - xact_start AS xact_age,
             now() - query_start AS query_age,
             left(query, 120) AS query
      FROM pg_stat_activity
      WHERE datname = curr

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "AccountSnapshot" c
      LEFT JOIN "BrokerAccount" p ON p."id" = c."brokerAccountId"
      WHERE c."brokerAccountId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS orphans
      FROM "Trade" c
      LEFT JOIN "User" p ON p."id" = c."userId"
      WHERE c."userId" IS NOT NULL AND p."id" IS NULL

SELECT name, setting, unit
      FROM pg_settings
      WHERE name IN (
        'max_connections','shared_buffers','work_mem','maintenance_work_mem',
        'effective_cache_size','random_page_cost','default_transaction_isolation',
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT * FROM "BrokerAccount" LIMIT 20

SELECT tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name, kcu.column_name
    FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc
    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu
      ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.tab
SELECT version() AS v, current_database() AS db, current_user AS usr, current_setting('transaction_isolation') AS isolation
